intro.title: A doorway to the divine
intro.subtitle: Welcome to the gates of grace
intro.hint: Scroll, tap, or press any key to continue

hero.tagline: An interface attuned to the heart of the temple
hero.lede: Live crowd intelligence, festival calendars, sevas, donations and temple lore — gathered in one calm interface so devotees and administrators can move in rhythm with the temple's day.

preview.title: One pane of glass for the whole sannidhi.
preview.lede: Track footfall, bookings, donations and seva availability in real time. Built for hands-on temple operators, not analysts.

features.title: Six surfaces, one calm system.
features.lede: Aalayam respects the institution it serves — every feature is shaped around traditional temple operations rather than imposing a SaaS template.
features.f1Body: Aadi Pooram, Margazhi, Theppam, Pradosham — every observance with Tamil + English context, tracked across the lunar year.
features.f2Body: Slot-based capacity, transactional availability checks, instant references and 80G receipts — built for temple-grade audit trails.
features.f3Body: Hourly forecasts and seven-day projections derived from weekday rhythm, festivals and live arrivals — quietly, without surveillance.
features.f4Body: Cause-based contributions for annadhanam, deepa aaradhanai, vedic schools and renovation. PAN capture and tax receipts handled.
features.f5Body: Every primary surface ships in Tamil and English with Noto Serif Tamil typography — devotees recognise their temple in their tongue.
features.f6Body: No tracking pixels, no third-party cookies, JWT auth, PII-free tokens. Donation lists are name-only, fully opt-in.

crowd.title: Step into the temple at the calmest hour of your day.
crowd.p1: Hourly footfall projections from sunrise to night-aarti.
crowd.p2: Festival-aware: Aadi Pooram, Margazhi and Theppam are weighted automatically.
crowd.p3: Seven-day outlook with peak-hour callouts for travel planning.
crowd.p4: No personal tracking — projections are slot-level, not visitor-level.

gallery.title: The temple, in its living textures.
gallery.lede: A glimpse of festivals, rituals and architecture across Tamil Nadu.

testimonials.title: Trusted by families and temple administrators alike.

faqTeaser.title: Everything you'd ask at the front desk.

cta.title: A doorway, opened with intention.
cta.lede: Step into your temple's digital sanctum. Sign in to book sevas, donate and receive your darshan reference instantly.

footer.brand: A digital sanctum for Tamil Nadu's living temples — built with calm, modern engineering and reverence for tradition.

dashboard.title: Today at the temple
dashboard.peakBody: Expected peak occurs around <0>{{hour}}:00</0>. Encourage devotees to plan calmer windows in the early morning Suprabhata or between 14:00–16:00 when crowds thin.

events.title: Festivals & observances
events.lede: Plan your visit around the temple's living calendar. Each tradition is observed by generations — at sunrise, in the cool of the evening, and through the long Margazhi nights.

bookings.title: Reserve your moment
bookings.lede: Choose a seva, pick a date, confirm the number of devotees. Slots are limited so each devotee receives unhurried sannidhi.
bookings.available: {{available}} of {{capacity}} places available on this date.
bookings.successFmt: Booking {{ref}} confirmed for ₹{{amount}}. Payment order {{order}} created — open the secure gateway to complete payment.
bookings.noneYet: No bookings yet. Your reserved sevas will appear here.

donations.title: Donations
donations.lede: Your offering keeps the lamps lit. Donations of ₹500 and above are eligible for 80G receipts.
donations.name: Your name
donations.razorpayNote: Payment is processed via Razorpay. You will be redirected to a secure page.
donations.successFmt: Thank you, {{name}}. Donation reference {{ref}} created. Secure payment order {{order}} ready.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.lede: Tell us about your visit. Praise, prayers, suggestions — every word helps us serve better.
feedback.name: Name
feedback.successMsg: Thank you. Your reflection has been received.
feedback.noneYet: No feedback yet — be the first to share.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceLede: Choose how Aalayam looks on this device.
settings.languageLede: All UI text switches instantly. Your choice is remembered on this device.
settings.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage your bookings and donations.

auth.registerHint: Just an email and a name — used only for your bookings.
auth.name: Name

dashboardHome.title: Live crowd analytics across the temple complex
dashboardHome.lede: Four independent modules feed one combined picture of the day. Tap a card to dive in.

parkingOps.title: Vehicle flow & estimated people
parkingOps.logicNote: Currently parked = entries − exits.  Estimated people = (2W × 1.5) + (Cars × 3.5) + (Buses × 25) + (Auto × 2).

cctv.title: Live detection feed
cctv.feedPlaceholder: Demo placeholder — wire your AI counting feed by POSTing to /api/v1/cctv/ingest

prediction.title: Forecast a future day’s crowd
prediction.lede: Choose a date. The model uses five years of footfall, weekly patterns, monthly seasonality and known festival multipliers to project expected attendance.
prediction.noPredictionYet: Choose a date to generate a forecast.

finalReport.title: Combined crowd analysis
finalReport.lede: Aggregated from parking-derived people, CCTV detection and confirmed bookings.
finalReport.exportNote: Export-friendly · plug PDF / Excel here when needed.

parking.title: Parking
parking.lede: Register your vehicle on arrival. Live counts help you choose a gate without circling the temple.
parking.successFmt: Entry {{ref}} saved. Park in the {{lot}} bay.
